spaceSetting.title: Settings
spaceSetting.generalDescription: Change the settings for your current space here
spaceSetting.collaboratorDescription: Manage collaborators of your space and set their access permission

pin.empty: Your pined bases and space will appear here

tooltip.noPermissionToCreateBase: You don't have permission to create base

tip.delete: Are you sure you want to delete <0/>?
tip.title: Tips
tip.exportTips1: Export the current base as a .tea file, which may take some time. You can check the export results in the notification center.
tip.exportTips2: You can import the .tea file in space -> more -> import
tip.exportTips3: Cross-base relation fields will be converted to single line text.
tip.exportIncludeDataDescription: Export only structure and configuration when closing
tip.exportDescription: Export the current database to a .tea file, which may take some time.
tip.exportSlowTip: The data volume is large. Export may take a while. You can leave temporarily.
tip.moveBaseCrossSpaceDataLossWarning: Cross-space references aren't supported. The related fields will be converted to text fields. This action cannot be undone.

deleteSpaceModal.title: Delete space
deleteSpaceModal.blockedDesc: This space has an active subscription. Please cancel the subscription before deleting the space.
deleteSpaceModal.permanentDeleteWarning: This action will permanently delete all resources and data under the current space. Please proceed with caution!
deleteSpaceModal.confirmInputLabel: Please type DELETE to confirm the deletion

sharedBase.title: Shared with me
sharedBase.description: All the bases that invited me to join
sharedBase.empty: No bases shared with me yet

aiSetting.title: AI settings
aiSetting.description: Manage AI settings of your space
aiSetting.enableTips: Enable AI to use AI features in your space instead of using the system AI
aiSetting.enableSwitchTips: Please configure the large coding model before enabling

import.baseImportTips: Click or drag and drop .tea file to upload in this area

publishBase.title: Publish to Template Center
publishBase.description: One-click publish base to the Template Center! Let more people see, use, and Remix your creativity, and build a more powerful business together
publishBase.previewTips: Let the world see your work
publishBase.unPublishConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to unpublish this base? It will no longer be visible in the Template Center.

tips.atLeastOneNode: At least select one node to publish

publishBase.urlCopiedForDiscord: URL copied to clipboard! You can paste it in Discord.
publishBase.featuredTip: Officially featured. Your template will receive more exposure.
publishBase.unfeaturedTip: Not featured yet. Keep improving for a chance to be highlighted. Let more people see your work.
publishBase.publishSuccessDescription: Share your work to the world

unpublishedApps.title: Unpublished Apps Detected
unpublishedApps.description: Unpublished apps may cause template preview failures. Publish them now or continue anyway.
unpublishedApps.publishFailedTip1: Check if the source app can be published successfully

create.title: Data database
create.description: Choose where this space stores base schemas and records.
create.byodbHint: Initialize this space in a Teable internal schema inside your customer-managed database.
create.sslHint: Use the same SSL parameters required by your PostgreSQL server. The password is never shown after testing.
create.retestRequired: Test again after changing the URL.
create.databaseHint: Choose the PostgreSQL database for this space, then test the connection again.
create.testFailed: Failed to test the database connection.

INVALID_DATABASE_URL.message: The PostgreSQL connection URL is invalid.

PRIVATE_NETWORK_BLOCKED.message: Private network database hosts are blocked by default.
PRIVATE_NETWORK_BLOCKED.remediation: Set TEABLE_SSRF_PROTECTION_DISABLED=true only in trusted self-hosted deployments.

CONNECTION_FAILED.message: Failed to connect to the database.
CONNECTION_FAILED.remediation: Check host, port, database name, username, password, and SSL parameters.

IPV6_NETWORK_UNREACHABLE.message: The database host resolved to an IPv6 address, but this Teable deployment cannot reach IPv6 networks.
IPV6_NETWORK_UNREACHABLE.remediation: Use an IPv4-reachable database endpoint or connection pooler, or enable IPv6 outbound networking for this Teable deployment.

DDL_PRIVILEGE_CHECK_FAILED.message: The account is missing DDL privileges required to initialize a Teable data database.
DDL_PRIVILEGE_CHECK_FAILED.remediation: Grant privileges to create schemas, tables, functions, and triggers.

NON_EMPTY_UNKNOWN_DATABASE.message: Teable's internal schema already contains objects that are not managed by Teable.
NON_EMPTY_UNKNOWN_DATABASE.remediation: Use a database without a conflicting internal schema, or remove the unknown objects from that schema.

INCOMPATIBLE_TEABLE_DATABASE.message: This database contains incomplete or incompatible Teable data objects.
INCOMPATIBLE_TEABLE_DATABASE.remediation: Use an empty database or a compatible Teable data database migration/adopt flow.
